title: asplenium × boydstoniae
intro: Asplenium × boydstoniae, also known as Boydston's spleenwort, is a rare hybrid fern species that is native to the southeastern United States. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been attributed to its high content of tannins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Boydston's spleenwort include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. It can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for medicinal use.
